about_description: 3M's India centers pair R&D and product engineering in Bengaluru with manufacturing-linked and shared-services work across Pune, Ahmedabad and Chennai. The footprint supports global product development, supply-chain analytics and enterprise IT for 3M's safety, transportation and healthcare businesses.
lede: 3M runs seven capability centers across five Indian cities. Bengaluru, Pune, Ahmedabad, Chennai and Gurugram, covering R&D, manufacturing support and shared services, built over fifteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one 3M office in India. We map seven, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
